name: balumbacraft
description: BalumbaCraft — custom Minecraft launcher for a private Create modpack (NeoForge 1.21.1)
author: BalumbaCraft

scripts.dev: npm run core:build && npm run dev -w @balumba/launcher
scripts.build: npm run core:build && npm run build -w @balumba/launcher
scripts.build:win: npm run core:build && npm run build:win -w @balumba/launcher
scripts.typecheck: npm run core:build && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
